{{Quote|He is young and has not been able to prove himself in battle.|A Mandalorian sergeant, about Davrel|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Davrel''' was a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-[[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] recruit on the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] during the [[Dark Wars]], serving under [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Canderous Ordo|the Preserver]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|You would deny my request? I want to fight here, in front of other Mandalorians to prove my worth. Do not shame me further.|Davrel|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />}}
Having missed the opportunity to fight in the [[Mandalorian Wars]] due to his young age at that time, Davrel felt unworthy and wanted to seek a way to prove himself a worthy [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]].

When he was challenged by [[Meetra Surik]] in the [[Battle Circle]] on Dxun, he gladly accepted the challenge, but lost, even though they [[Unarmed combat/Legends|fought unarmed]] and Surik was not using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Enraged, Davrel waited for Surik outside the [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|Mandalorian camp]] and challenged her to a fight without rules, asking to give him a warrior's [[Death/Legends|death]].

Instead of killing him in a battle where he would not stand a chance, Surik suggested another way of improving his reputation of a warrior. Davrel agreed to help her defeat a [[Zakkeg/Legends|zakkeg]] and by doing so, redeemed himself for his failure in the Battle Circle, and proving himself to be a good warrior.

==Behind the scenes==
An alternate ending includes Surik adhering to Davrel's wish and giving him an honorable death. In this case, [[Canderous Ordo]], the [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]], would commend Surik for their understanding of the Mandalorian ways. This option gives less experience than teaming up against the [[Zakkeg/Legends|zakkeg]].

An alternative light-side option is to turn down Davrel's request for an honorable death, causing Davrel runs off into the jungle. His body is found later, killed by [[permacrete detonator]]s.

Davrel can also fall in combat if the zakkeg is not killed fast enough. Unlike full companions, he cannot be revived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
